step_rationale: SMARCA4 regulates oxidative stress and VSMC behavior; causal target in lipid-driven atherothrombosis.
mechanism: SMARCA4 influences DNA methylation and vascular smooth-muscle-cell behavior, modulating oxidative stress-linked pathways in MI susceptibility.

references.title: Integrative functional genomics analysis identifies pleiotropic genes for vascular diseases.
Oxidative Stress-Related Genome-Wide Mendelian Randomization Identifies Causal Genes for Coronary Artery Disease.
Epigenome-wide association of myocardial infarction with DNA methylation sites at loci related to cardiovascular disease.
